name: agile-sofl-monorepo
description: Agile-SOFL monorepo: parser, language server, editor API, VS Code extension, and Studio

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @agile-sofl/parser && npm run build --workspace @agile-sofl/editor-api && npm run build --workspace @agile-sofl/language-server && npm run build --workspace agile-sofl --if-present && npm run build --workspace @agile-sofl/studio --if-present
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @agile-sofl/parser && npm run test --workspace @agile-sofl/editor-api && npm run test --workspace @agile-sofl/language-server && npm run test --workspace agile-sofl --if-present && npm run test --workspace @agile-sofl/studio --if-present
